title: Mid-Level Radiologist at BD India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at BD India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? BD India Holdings Services in Meerut offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About BD India Holdings Services:
BD India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BD India Holdings Services!
